sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ni tumna gal-ah, Aw a nuam zingsang,
Topa hong om ciang, Vantung hi zo;
Khualzin na bei
in, minthanna mu ding;
Ni tumna gal-ah, Lei bei ni ciang.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ni tumna gal-ah, Meii kai
ngeilohna,
Huihpi om nawn lo, Launa bei ta;
Aw lungdam na ni, Aw bei ngei lo ni,
Ni tumna
galna gal-ah, tawntung nopna.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni tumna gal-ah, Khut tawh hong kha ding,
I biak i
Topa, Pasian kiangah;
A ma minthanna hong dawnna kamkhum,
Kei a’ ding hi ta, Tua
gungal-ah.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ni tumna gal-ah, Lungdam kikholhna,
A tungsa i it, i lawmte tawh;
Tua
a nuam gam sung, Kikhen nawn lo ding,
Ni tumna gal-ah, a tawntung ah.
